title: Smoky Creamy Australian Kale Toast
description: A nostalgic, lowcarb Australian toast topped with bitter kale, creamy herb sauce and a smoky paprika finish.
instructions: Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C). Place English muffin halves on a baking sheet and toast for 4‑5 minutes until golden.
Heat olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat. Add minced garlic and sauté 30 seconds until fragrant.
Add chopped kale to skillet, stir, and cook until wilted, about 4‑5 minutes. Season with salt and pepper.
Remove skillet from heat and stir in butter until melted.
In a small bowl, combine Greek yogurt, lemon juice, smoked paprika, cumin, and crushed red pepper flakes. Whisk until smooth.
Spread the yogurt mixture evenly over each toasted muffin half.
Spoon the sautéed kale over the yogurt-topped toasts.
Sprinkle grated Parmesan cheese over the kale.
Return to oven for 5 minutes, or until the cheese melts and edges turn golden.
Remove from oven, garnish with chopped parsley, slice if desired, and serve immediately.
